raw_consumer_statement: Was attempting to price match bestbuy 's own price for Order Number : XXXX but store rep accidentally returned thr entire item to me instead and told me to repurchase the item at the new price. Old order number had XXXX dollars worth of gift certificates used and only XXXX dollars was refunded to my credit card. New purchase charges my credit card XXXX dollars. Bestbuy only credited me back XXXX in certificates, still short XXXX USD in value.
